title: Container libs vendor and Renovate config update

comments.body:
> Thanks!
> 
> I don’t feel strongly strongly about the updated frequency, but
> 
>     * Can you write down (in the commit messages, or at least in the PR) _why_ we are making the change, please?

Will do.

> 
>     * Do I read `before 11am` correctly to mean that once we move to a digest reference (like this PR does), Renovate is going to file a new update _every single day_? That seems excessive to me, as a guess (noting that I have no idea what the reason is, see above)

This was a copy-paste from the [podman renovate config](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/.github/renovate.json5). I was trying to vendor container-libs/image into skopeo and noticed it broke, then I realized skopeo needed more recent vendoring, and there were no automatic PRs by renovate here.

I think I would prefer a daily job to ensure there's regular updates and CI testing, but I'll defer to you. If you find that excessive, I'm ok to make it infrequent.
